landing.heroSubtitle: From zero to production dApps. Interactive courses, coding challenges, and on-chain credentials for Solana-native developers.
landing.heroSubtitleLine1: From theory to dApp in production.
landing.heroSubtitleLine2: Interactive courses, coding challenges, and onchain certificates.
landing.learningPathsIntro: Zero to deploy. Pick your course and earn XP and on-chain credentials.
landing.featuresIntro: Built for those who want to actually build on the highest-performance ecosystem.
landing.testimonial1Quote: The fundamentals track gave me a solid base. Within a month I had my first program on Devnet.
landing.testimonial2Quote: Code in hand, feedback in real time. Way better than video only.
landing.ctaFinalSubtitle: Create your free account and access all tracks.
landing.footerTagline: Building the future of Solana in Brazil.
landing.footerNewsletterDesc: News and events in your inbox.

onboarding.welcomeDescription: Take a quick quiz to discover your level and get personalized course recommendations.
onboarding.benefit3: Start earning XP and on-chain credentials
onboarding.resultDescription: Based on your answers, we prepared personalized recommendations for you.
onboarding.track_beginner_desc: Start with Solana fundamentals: architecture, accounts, transactions and your first programs.
onboarding.track_intermediate_desc: Dive deeper into DeFi, tokens and advanced protocols in the Solana ecosystem.
onboarding.track_advanced_desc: Build full-stack applications with Anchor, React and complete on-chain integration.
onboarding.bannerTitle: New here? Take the skill assessment quiz!
onboarding.bannerDescription: Discover your level and get personalized course recommendations in less than 2 minutes.
onboarding.q1: What is your experience with blockchain and crypto?
onboarding.q1_a: Never used it — I am completely new
onboarding.q1_b: I have bought/sold crypto, but don't develop
onboarding.q1_c: I have developed on another blockchain (Ethereum, etc.)
onboarding.q2_a: Beginner — I am learning to code
onboarding.q2_b: I know at least one language (JS, Python, etc.)
onboarding.q2_d: Senior / Full Stack with distributed systems experience
onboarding.q3: Do you know Rust or TypeScript?
onboarding.q4: What do you know about Solana's account model?
onboarding.q4_a: I don't know what that is
onboarding.q4_b: I have heard of it, but don't understand well
onboarding.q4_c: I understand accounts, PDAs and rent
onboarding.q4_d: I have created programs that manipulate accounts and PDAs
onboarding.q5: What is your experience with DeFi (Decentralized Finance)?
onboarding.q5_b: I have used DEX or lending (as a user)
onboarding.q5_c: I understand AMMs, liquidity pools and yield farming
onboarding.q5_d: I have developed or contributed to DeFi protocols
onboarding.q6: What do you want to learn at Superteam Academy?
onboarding.q6_a: Understand the basics of blockchain and Solana
onboarding.q6_c: Build complete dApps with frontend and backend
onboarding.q6_d: Deep dive into advanced topics (DeFi, NFTs, infrastructure)
onboarding.profileSetupDesc: Set up your profile and discover your level with a quick quiz.
onboarding.bioPlaceholder: Tell us a bit about yourself...
